name: Triple Chocolate Cookies
recipeIngredient: 9 oz Hershey's kisses (with or without almonds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a mixer bowl, beat together butter, granulated sugar, brown sugar, and vanilla until well blended.
3. Add eggs and milk; beat well.
4. Stir together flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, blending well.
6. Stir in chocolate chips.
7. Shape dough into 1-inch balls.
8. Place the balls on an ungreased cookie sheet.
9. Bake for 10 to 11 minutes.
10. Allow cookies to cool for 1 minute before transferring them to a wire rack.
11. Press Hershey's kisses into the center of each cookie.
12. Makes about 4 dozen cookies.
